mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) FROM fitness_booking b INNER JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.deleted = false AND u.deleted = false AND b.booking_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_course WHERE deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_booking WHERE deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.start_time) AS hour, COUNT(b.id) AS count FROM fitness_booking b INNER JOIN fitness_course c ON b.course_id = c.id WHERE b.deleted = false AND c.deleted = false AND b.status IN (1, 3) GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.start_time) ORDER BY hour

SELECT c.category AS categoryName, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS courseCount, COUNT(b.id) AS bookingCount FROM fitness_course c LEFT JOIN fitness_booking b ON c.id = b.course_id AND b.deleted = false WHERE c.deleted = false AND c.category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.category ORDER BY bookingCount DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM product_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED')

choose.when: SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at), 'HH24:00') AS date, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS amount FROM product_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at)
choose.otherwise: SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE(created_at), 'MM-DD') AS date, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS amount FROM product_order WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate}::date AND #{endDate}::date AND status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY DATE(created_at)

mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE(create_time), 'MM-DD') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_user WHERE DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate}::date AND #{endDate}::date AND deleted = false GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY DATE(create_time)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fitness_equipment WHERE deleted = false AND status = 2

SELECT CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '待处理' WHEN 1 THEN '处理中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN 3 THEN '已关闭' ELSE '未知' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM fitness_equipment_repair WHERE deleted = false GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
